x-notes.description:
### Expansion Options

This endpoint supports expanding relations. Use the `expand` parameter with any of the following paths:

- `project_id`
- `project_id.owner_id`
- `role_id`
- `role_id.project_id`
- `role_id.project_id.owner_id`

You can also combine multiple expansions with commas (e.g., `expand=field1,field2.nested`).
